title: Jhingedaau
overview: "Jhingedaau" is a 2022 Nepali romantic comedy-drama directed by Gyanendra Bahadur Deuja, based on Bhimnidhi Tiwari's story.  The film portrays two sisters-in-law whose friendly rivalry during the traditional dice game "Jhinge Dau" leads to family discord, highlighting the unforeseen consequences of seemingly harmless actions.  The film stars Keki Adhikari, Mukun Bhusal, and Aanchal Sharma.  "Jhingedaau" received positive reviews for its blend of humor and social commentary, and won the Best Feature Film Award at the 2nd edition of the Nepal Rural Film Festival (NERUFF).
